name: Weldon Irvine
description: American composer, playwright, poet, pianist, organist, and keyboardist (1943–2002)
abstract: Weldon Jonathan Irvine Jr. (October 27, 1943 – April 9, 2002), also known as Master Wel, was an American composer, playwright, poet, pianist, organist, and keyboardist.

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Owens
about_quotes.evidence: But, a Weldon Irvine, numerous very fine artists on the scene featured their music with the CBA ensemble. I was the musical director for a number of concerts...
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Owens — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
